summary: Complete testing of Audit Logs page for AMLGuard. 31/31 backend tests passed. All frontend UI flows working correctly including stats bar (4 stats), filterable table with 6 columns, colored action labels, expandable rows with JSON details, CSV export, and pagination.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/audit-logs/stats returns 200
Backend: Stats has required fields (total_today, unique_users, screenings_today, cases_resolved_today)
Backend: Stats values are integers
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs returns 200
Backend: Response has logs array and total count
Backend: Each log entry has required fields (id, timestamp, user_name, action_type, module, ip_address)
Backend: At least 100 demo audit logs were seeded (found 263+)
Backend: Pagination with skip and limit works
Backend: Filter by action_type works
Backend: Filter by user_name works
Backend: Filter by module works
Backend: Filter by date range works
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs/filters returns 200
Backend: Filters response has action_types, modules, users
Backend: Action types list is not empty
Backend: Contains expected action types (screening_run, case_created, user_login, customer_created)
Backend: Modules list is not empty
Backend: Users list is not empty
Backend: GET /api/audit-logs/export/csv returns 200
Backend: CSV export has correct content type (text/csv)
Backend: CSV export has Content-Disposition header for download
Backend: CSV export has expected column headers
Backend: CSV export has data rows
Backend: CSV export respects filters
Backend: Logs include various action types for color coding
Backend: Some logs have details field for expandable rows
Backend: Details field is a dictionary when present
Backend: Audit logs endpoint requires authentication (401 without auth)
Backend: Stats endpoint requires authentication
Backend: Filters endpoint requires authentication
Backend: CSV export requires authentication
Frontend: Login with shyam@sentrixai.com / Sentrix@2024 works
Frontend: Audit Log page title displays correctly
Frontend: Stats bar shows 4 stats (Events Today, Active Users, Screenings Today, Cases Resolved)
Frontend: Table renders with 6 columns (Timestamp, User, Action, Resource, IP Address, Details)
Frontend: 50 rows displayed per page
Frontend: Action labels have correct colors - Screening Run (blue #2563eb)
Frontend: Action labels have correct colors - Case Resolved (green #10b981)
Frontend: Action labels have correct colors - API Key Generated (purple #a855f7)
Frontend: Action labels have correct colors - Customer Added (teal #14b8a6)
Frontend: Action labels have correct colors - Login (gray #64748b)
Frontend: Action labels have correct colors - SAR Filed (red #ef4444)
Frontend: Action labels have correct colors - Assigned/Status Changed (yellow #f59e0b)
Frontend: Clicking View button expands row to show JSON details
Frontend: Clicking Collapse button collapses expanded row
Frontend: View button only appears on rows with details
Frontend: Rows without details show dash (—)
Frontend: Export CSV button downloads audit_log.csv file
Frontend: Filter by action type works
Frontend: Filter by user works
Frontend: Filter by module works
Frontend: Date range filter works
Frontend: Clear All filters button resets all filters
Frontend: Pagination works (Page 1 of 6, prev/next buttons)
Frontend: Dark theme confirmed (rgb(8, 12, 18) background)
seed_data_creation: 100 demo audit log entries seeded on startup spanning last 30 days. Total entries: 263+ (100 demo + 163 from actual usage). Action types include: screening_run, case_created, case_resolved, api_key_created, customer_created, user_login, sar_filed, settings_changed, case_status_changed, quick_screening_run, customer_updated, case_assigned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Audit Logs page fully tested. Features verified: Stats bar (Events Today, Active Users, Screenings Today, Cases Resolved), filterable table with 6 columns (Timestamp, User, Action, Resource, IP Address, Details), colored action labels (18 different action types with correct colors), expandable rows showing JSON key-value details, Export CSV button (downloads audit_log.csv), filters (Action Type, User, Module, From Date, To Date), Clear All button, pagination (50 per page, 6 pages total). Backend endpoints: GET /api/audit-logs, GET /api/audit-logs/stats, GET /api/audit-logs/filters, GET /api/audit-logs/export/csv. All endpoints require authentication. Signzy KYC and OpenSanctions AML screening APIs remain MOCKED from previous phases.

stats_bar.events_today: Dynamic count of today's audit events
stats_bar.active_users: Count of unique users active today

expandable_rows.details_display: JSON key-value pairs in monospace font

filters.user: Dropdown with all users (Anita Desai, Priya Sharma, Rahul Verma, Shyam - Super Admin)
filters.module: Dropdown with all modules (api_keys, audit, auth, cases, customers, kyc, screening, settings)
filters.date_range: From Date and To Date inputs
